user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to add a new pre-interview question, so that candidates can be assessed before interviews
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Pre-Interview Questionnaire screen; When I click Add new question and provide the question details; Then the question is created and listed

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to add weightage for position level questions, so that scoring reflects the importance of each question per position
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Pre-Interview Questionnaire screen; When I click Add weightage for position level questions and set the weightage; Then it is saved for the position level

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to set a value, score and mandatory flag for a question, so that responses can be scored and required consistently
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a question; When I enter a Value and Score and set Mandatory; Then I can Save and the settings are applied

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to view questions with their category, type, and position or employee class specificity, so that I can review the questionnaire configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given questions exist; When I open the list; Then each question shows Category, Question type, Field type, Position specific and Employee class specific

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to refresh the questionnaire list, so that I see the latest configured questions
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Pre-Interview Questionnaire screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
